subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-13 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: One day a layman went to a Mullah and asked several questions. The Mullah did not answer him.
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @stories; anecdotes, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
